name: Rate Law from Concentration
description: Determine a reaction's rate law by the method of initial rates: vary reactant concentrations, measure initial rates, deduce the order in each reactant, then assemble the rate law and solve for the rate constant.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Reaction to study"]
    N2["Vary initial [reactant]"]
    N3["Measure initial rate"]
    N4["Rate vs concentration"]
    N5{"Orders determined?"}
    N6["Collect more rate data"]
    N7["r = k[A]^m[B]^n"]
    N8["Solve for k"]
    N9["Validated rate law"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 -->|no| N6
    N6 -->|repeat| N2
    N5 -->|yes| N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 --> N9

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
